pi_items.source: Cross-referenced in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh; matches task description requirement to save Blender project
Cross-referenced in task description, setup_task.sh, and export_result.sh; matches 'save it to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/line_art_render.png'
Task description explicitly states 'Set Line Thickness to a value between 2.0 and 5.0 pixels'; verifier code confirms this range is enforced
Task description explicitly states 'Set Line Thickness to a value between 2.0 and 5.0 pixels'; verifier code confirms this range is enforced

Verifier code uses this threshold (0.15 in 0-1 RGB scale, equivalent to ~38/255 in 8-bit) to validate line color is near black. Task requires 'Line Color is black (RGB 0, 0, 0)'. The 0.15 threshold allows dark grey tolerance, which is reasonable for rendering validation but not explicitly stated in task description.

Verifier code uses this threshold (0.85 in 0-1 RGB scale, equivalent to ~217/255 in 8-bit) to validate background is near white. Task requires 'World Background color to White (RGB 1, 1, 1)'. The 0.85 threshold allows light grey tolerance, which is reasonable for rendering validation but not explicitly stated in task description.
Task description explicitly states 'Set the Render Resolution to 1920x1080'; verifier confirms this is 16:9 Full HD; setup_task.sh sets scene.render.resolution_x = 1920 and resolution_y = 1080

privileged_info_summary: Task uses BMW27.blend, a real Blender official demo file (3MB) from https://download.blender.org/demo/test/BMW27.blend.zip, not synthetic data. The task requires configuring Freestyle rendering with specific parameters: line thickness 2.0-5.0px with black color (validated via threshold 0.15), white background (validated via threshold 0.85), and 1920x1080 resolution. Expected output files are freestyle_setup.blend and line_art_render.png in /home/ga/BlenderProjects/.
